quickespnow_init_current.message0: Initialize QuickESPNow on current WiFi channel interface %1 send mode %2
quickespnow_init_current.tooltip: Start QuickESPNow on the current WiFi channel. Prefer this block when WiFi is connected or AP mode is already enabled.

quickespnow_init_channel.message0: Initialize QuickESPNow channel %1 interface %2 send mode %3
quickespnow_init_channel.tooltip: Start QuickESPNow on the specified channel. When WiFi is not connected, the channel usually needs to be set explicitly.

quickespnow_set_channel.tooltip: Switch the WiFi channel currently in use.

quickespnow_enable_transmit.tooltip: Enable or pause sending queued data.

quickespnow_send_text.message0: QuickESPNow send text to MAC %1 content %2
quickespnow_send_text.tooltip: Send a text message to the specified MAC address.

quickespnow_send_broadcast_text.tooltip: Broadcast a text message to all devices on the current channel.

quickespnow_on_received.tooltip: Register a callback for received data. In the callback, you can read the message, length, RSSI, broadcast flag and sender MAC.

quickespnow_on_sent.tooltip: Register a send-complete callback. In the callback, you can read the target MAC and send status.

quickespnow_ready_to_send.tooltip: Return whether it is currently suitable to send the next message.

quickespnow_last_send_result.tooltip: Return the latest send or sendBcast return value. 0 means success.

quickespnow_get_max_message_length.tooltip: Return the maximum message length supported by the current platform.

quickespnow_get_address_length.tooltip: Return the MAC address byte length, usually 6.

quickespnow_received_message.tooltip: Read the received text message inside the receive callback.

quickespnow_received_length.tooltip: Read the received data length inside the receive callback.

quickespnow_received_rssi.tooltip: Read the signal strength RSSI inside the receive callback.

quickespnow_received_is_broadcast.tooltip: Check whether the message came from a broadcast inside the receive callback.

quickespnow_received_sender_mac.tooltip: Read the sender MAC address inside the receive callback.

quickespnow_sent_target_mac.tooltip: Read the target MAC address inside the send-complete callback.

quickespnow_sent_status.tooltip: Read the underlying send status inside the send-complete callback.
